{{CargoRelic
|name=Top Chef Badge
|class_id=20935
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A badge issued by the Culinary Association, attainable only by passing the quadrennial test for master chefs. It's not only the highest honor in the culinary world but also a symbol of exquisite culinary skills.
|fame=31
|art=17
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=15
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per 3 Cooking Utensil LVLs, Snail DEF +1<br>Cooking Utensil LVL: 60/60
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 3 Cooking Utensil LVLs, Snail DEF +2<br>Cooking Utensil LVL: 60/60
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Cooking Utensil LVLs, Snail DEF +3<br>Cooking Utensil LVL: 60/60
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Cooking Utensil LVLs, Snail DEF +3<br>Cooking Utensil LVL: 60/60
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Cooking Utensil LVLs, Snail DEF +3<br>Cooking Utensil LVL: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
